# Kruzty
> A community-driven platform for sharing and downloading live wallpapers for pc and mobile devices.

## About
Kruzty offers a wide range of animated wallpapers, from anime to nature themes, with widgets for users to create their own designs.

## Key Pages
- [Live Wallpapers](/): Browse our collection of live wallpapers.
- [Download](/download): Get the Kruzty app for Windows PC and Android.
- [Categories](/categories): A wide range of categories to choose Live Wallpapers from.
- [Signup](/): Signup to Kruzty.
- [Upload Wallpapers](/create): Share live wallpapers with the community.
